channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 3.8%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Starmer is doing nothing, but Burnham is for the people’: Makerfield voters pin their hopes on the ‘King of the North’
item.description: ‘Starmer is doing nothing, but Burnham is for the people’: Makerfield voters pin their hopes on the ‘King of the North’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting launches scathing attack on Starmer - and calls for UK to rejoin EU
item.description: Streeting launches scathing attack on Starmer - and calls for UK to rejoin EU

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Wes Streeting calls for the UK to rejoin the EU in his speech to the Progress conference.
“We need a new special relationship with the EU, because Britain’s future lies with Europe - and one day back in the European ...
item.description:
Wes Streeting calls for the UK to rejoin the EU in his speech to the Progress conference.
“We need a new special relationship with the EU, because Britain’s future lies with Europe - and one day back in the European ...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Streeting sets up Burnham battle with call for Labour to debate ‘ideas not personalities’
item.description: Politics latest: Streeting sets up Burnham battle with call for Labour to debate ‘ideas not personalities’

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Streeting continues:
“As a result, we arrived in government underprepared in too many areas and lacking clarity of vision and direction. Questions which had gone unanswered in opposition couldn't be ignored in office...
item.description:
Streeting continues:
“As a result, we arrived in government underprepared in too many areas and lacking clarity of vision and direction. Questions which had gone unanswered in opposition couldn't be ignored in office...

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Wes Streeting says there had been an “overcautiousness” in Labour when the party was in opposition
“Interesting policy ideas couldn't be floated because we were too afraid of what the Tories might say, so we said not...
item.description:
Wes Streeting says there had been an “overcautiousness” in Labour when the party was in opposition
“Interesting policy ideas couldn't be floated because we were too afraid of what the Tories might say, so we said not...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Another Reform candidate resigns after vetting failure – and councils are forced to pick up the bill
item.description: Another Reform candidate resigns after vetting failure – and councils are forced to pick up the bill

item.title: i Politics: 'I support Reform, but will vote Burnham to get rid of Starmer'
item.description: 'I support Reform, but will vote Burnham to get rid of Starmer'

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Restore UK are standing in Makerfield which will help Burnham by pulling a few votes away from Reform. Will be an interesting test if how split the right vote is.
item.description: Restore UK are standing in Makerfield which will help Burnham by pulling a few votes away from Reform. Will be an interesting test if how split the right vote is.

item.title: The Times: Why big business fears ‘Raynernomics’ — and Andy Burnham - The Times
item.description: Why big business fears ‘Raynernomics’ — and Andy Burnham - The Times
